title: Malpedia
description:
Malpedia is a free resource from Fraunhofer FKIE that provides comprehensive information on malware families, including descriptions, aliases, references, and YARA detection rules. The platform is curated by security researchers and provides high-quality malware intelligence.

This connector imports malware families, associated threat actors (intrusion sets), and YARA rules from Malpedia into OpenCTI.

Key features:

- Malware family import with descriptions, aliases, and references
- Threat actor (intrusion set) associations
- YARA detection rule import as indicators
- Sample hash observables creation
- Configurable TLP markings
short_description: Malpedia connector imports curated malware family intelligence, threat actor associations, and YARA detection rules from Fraunhofer FKIE's open research platform.
